Updated: 11/2/2025, 6:06:37 AM

📋 Important Information about Fiscal Receipts

Your rights and obligations

1
If you do not receive the fiscal receipt, you are obliged to request it
2
In case of refusal, you have the right to benefit from the purchased goods or services rendered without paying its value
3
Request and keep fiscal receipts to be able to participate in the monthly and occasional draws of the fiscal receipt lottery
4
It is forbidden to hand over to the client any other document certifying the payment for goods or services, other than the fiscal receipt
5
To report non-compliance with legal obligations by economic operators, you can call free, non-stop, the TelVerde service of the Ministry of Public Finance: 0800.800.085

These rights and obligations are established by the provisions of Government Emergency Ordinance no. 28/1999 regarding the obligation of economic operators to use electronic fiscal marking devices.

📋 Allergen and portion information complies with EU Regulation 1169/2011.
For additional details about ingredients, please contact our staff.
📍 Str. Exemplu Nr. 123, București | 📞 +40 123 456 789
🌐 www.restaurant-app.ro | ✉️ contact@restaurant-app.ro
🍹
